title: Simple Sweets
description: This mod aims to fix the boredom of playing Minecraft too many times while still feeling vanilla. The mod contains a wide variety of unique items that provide a new experience but feel familiar to the base game of Minecraft.
body:
# Content

## New Creatures

Players can interact with multiple new creatures that spice up the game and add to its atmosphere.

## New Stone Types

Players will now be able to find multiple new variants of stone. Players exploring caves will find limestone and slate (more to come). These stones can be crafted into various blocks such as stairs, slabs, and walls.

## Structures

Many new structures can be found in both the Overworld and in the End (Nether coming soon). Some of these structures exist to make the world feel more alive and others are dungeons to gather loot!

## Wood Types

The mod adds multiple new types of wood with accompanying trees. Players will find maple trees, a nice tan wood, in forests. Players can also find mahogany trees in jungles which provide players with a rich, red type of wood. Ash trees can be found in wooded badlands and have lost their leaves due to the extreme heat. This wood is ashy in color.

## Armor/Weapons/Tools

The mod adds multiple types of armor to the game which all have their own abilities. There is an armor set that follows a progression path similar to netherite. Another armor set is focused on the exploration of the nether and is meant for mid-game players. The mod also has many weapons and tools that accompany these armor sets including copper tools which become more oxidized as they lose durability. The mod also adds many times of enchantments that adapt the playstyles of all Minecraft players.

## Miscellaneous Blocks/Items

The mod contains items and blocks that enhance the vanilla experience and provide new mechanics to explore. A light sensor can be crafted which provides an output to a comparator that corresponds to the light level of the block in front of the sensor. A unique weapon can be found in the depths of the woodland mansions which harnesses the power of evokers!

## Dependencies

None for now - subject to change*

If your language is missing, let me know in the comments and I will do my best to add it (there may be mistakes)!

P.S. This is my first mod that I have dedicated a lot of time to, so feedback would be greatly appreciated!

All music is done by the amazing T_en_M!
